scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace web" "npm run dev --workspace server"
scripts.db:setup: docker compose up -d postgres && until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U postgres -d jobcopilot >/dev/null 2>&1; do echo "Waiting for PostgreSQL..."; sleep 1; done && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/jobcopilot?schema=public} npm run prisma:migrate
